title: Odos API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from the Odos API OpenAPI 3.1 specification

ChainTokenPriceMap.title: ChainTokenPriceMap
ChainTokenPriceMap.description:
All token prices for a given chain

Attributes:
    currencyId (str): price service id of the currency
    tokenPrices (dict): Token and price

CurrencyInfo.title: CurrencyInfo
CurrencyInfo.description:
Schema for supported currency info

Attributes:TokenPrice
    id (str): price service id of the currency
    name (str): name of currency corresponding to ID

CurrencyInfoList.title: CurrencyInfoList
CurrencyInfoList.description:
Schema for list of supported currency info

Attributes:
    currencies (List[CurrencyInfo]): list of supported currency info entries

CurrentBlockNumber.title: CurrentBlockNumber
CurrentBlockNumber.description:
Schema for current block number response

Attributes:
    blockNumber (int): current odos block number

chainId.title: Chainid
chainId.description: Chain ID to request path for

inputTokens.title: Inputtokens
inputTokens.description: Input tokens and amounts for quote

outputTokens.title: Outputtokens
outputTokens.description: Output tokens and proportions for quote

userAddr.title: Useraddr
userAddr.description: Address of wallet to use to generate transaction

slippageLimitPercent.title: Slippagelimitpercent
slippageLimitPercent.description: Slippage to use for checking the path is valid

sourceBlacklist.title: Sourceblacklist
sourceBlacklist.description: List of liquidity providers that are not to be used for the swap path.

sourceWhitelist.title: Sourcewhitelist
sourceWhitelist.description: List of liquidity providers to exclusively use for the swap path.

poolBlacklist.title: Poolblacklist
poolBlacklist.description: List of pool addresses to exclude from swap path consideration

disableRFQs.title: Disablerfqs
disableRFQs.description: Flag to disable all off-chain RFQs from order routing

PathRequestV3.title: PathRequestV3
PathRequestV3.description: Public facing path request v3 schema

PathResponse.title: PathResponse
PathResponse.description:
Assembled Path Transaction Response including quote, transaction, and simulation data

Attributes:
    blockNumber (int): block number of transaction quote
    gasEstimate (int): gas estimate for transaction quote
    gasEstimateValue (float): gas estimate value for transaction quote in gwei
    inputTokens (List[TokenAmount]): list of input token amounts and input values
    outputTokens (List[TokenAmount]): list of output token amounts and output values
    netOutValue (float): new out value of transaction from quote
    outValues (List[str]) out values from transaction quote
    transaction (Optional[Transaction]): assembled transaction data for quote
    simulation (Optional[Simulation]): simulation output data if enabled
    pathVizImage (Optional[str]): path viz image if requested

PathVizImageConfig.title: PathVizImageConfig
PathVizImageConfig.description: Schema for path viz image config

Simulation.title: Simulation
Simulation.description:
Simulation data schema

Attributes:
    is_success (bool): true if no errors were detected during simulation
    amountsOut (List[int]): list of amounts out from simulation
    gasEstimate (int): on-chain estimateGas raw response value
    simulationError (Optional[SimulationError]): simulation error data (if error)

SimulationError.title: SimulationError
SimulationError.description:
Simulation error schema

Attributes:
    type (str): error type
    errorMessage (str): content of the simulation error message

chainId.description: Chain ID to request path for

TokenPrice.title: TokenPrice
TokenPrice.description:
Schema for basic token price structure

Attributes:
    currencyId (str): price service id of the currency
    price (Optional[float]): fiat price of asset if it is available

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description:
Assembled Transaction Schema

Attributes:
    gas (int): txn gas amount
    gasPrice (int): txn gas price in gwei
    value (str): value of the transaction
    to (str): txn to address
    from_ (str): txn from address
    data (str): txn bytecode to execute
    nonce (int): current user nonce
    chainId (int): id of the chain transaction was assembled for
